status: PARTIAL — Business Reports not renderable via Chrome extension. Inventory and Payments fresh from 4/11 scrape. 1 confirmed filter sale on April 9 inferred from inventory delta (141 → 140).
_data_quality_note: This file covers 2026-04-09. Scrape was executed on 2026-04-11 due to scheduled task delay. Inventory data is from 4/11 scrape (377 fountain, 139 filters). The April 9 filter sale is inferred: filters went 141 (4/8) → 140 (4/9) → 139 (4/10 or 4/11). Sales dashboard confirms $0 on 4/10 and 4/11, so the 2nd filter sale post-4/8 occurred on 4/9.
